context:
### QUERY: Navin Fluorine pending litigation OR court case
Navin Fluorine disclosed a pending GST demand of approximately Rs 120 crore now under appeal before the CESTAT; an adverse order could affect FY27 cash flows.
SOURCES: https://www.bseindia.com/xml-data/corpfiling/AttachHis/navin-gst.pdf

### QUERY: Navin Fluorine credit rating CRISIL OR ICRA OR CARE
ICRA reaffirmed the long-term rating but flagged the debt-funded cGMP-4 capex peak as a monitorable for FY27.
SOURCES: https://www.icra.in/Rationale/ShowRationaleReport?Id=98231

### QUERY: Navin Fluorine Chemicals competition OR new capacity
Multiple Indian fluorochemical players are adding CDMO and R32 capacity, raising the risk of pricing pressure over FY27-28.
SOURCES: https://www.business-standard.com/companies/navin-fluorine-capacity
